{{Infobox
|image_url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PixelGuys/Cubyz/refs/tags/0.0.0/assets/cubyz/items/textures/cactus_arm.png
|durability=50
|mass_damage=1
|hardness_damage=1.5
|swing_speed=5.6
|tags=N/A
|modifiers=N/A
}}


== Properties ==
{{Stub|section}}

== Obtaining ==
{{Stub|section}}

== Usage ==
Cactus arms can be used as a tool material.

Cactus arms deal 0.5 damage on contact.

== History ==

* [[0.0.0]] - Added to the game

== Trivia ==
{{Stub|section}}

[[Category:Branches]]
[[Category:Materials]]
[[Category:Plants]]
